story: Beep beep! The beloved Volkswagen Beetle rolled off the production line in Germany for the last time in 1978. On January 19, the final German-made Beetle left the VW plant in Emden. This quirky car had captured hearts worldwide with its round shape and friendly face. While German production ended, Beetle fans could still get new ones made in Latin America for many years.
activity_question: Where was the last German-made Beetle produced?
bonus_fact: The Volkswagen Beetle was originally designed in the 1930s as a 'people's car' for German families.

title: A Zen Master's Journey Begins
story: A baby's cry echoed through Kyoto, Japan on January 19, 1200. Little did anyone know this newborn, named Dōgen, would grow up to become a famous Buddhist priest. Dōgen founded the Sōtō school of Zen, teaching people how to find peace through meditation. His wisdom still inspires many today, over 800 years later!
activity_question: What did Dōgen found?
follow_up_question: Can you think of ways to find peace in your daily life?

title: Pei Wenzhong: Unearthing Ancient Secrets
story: Bones and tools hidden for ages awaited discovery. On January 19, 1904, Pei Wenzhong was born in Fengnan, China. He grew up to become a famous anthropologist and archaeologist. Pei's most exciting find? Peking Man! These ancient human fossils helped scientists understand how people lived long ago. Pei's work opened a window into China's prehistoric past.
activity_question: What was Pei Wenzhong's most exciting find?
follow_up_question: Why do you think studying ancient human fossils is important?

title: Legendary Lion: Joe Schmidt's Football Journey
story: Roaring onto the gridiron, Joe Schmidt became a football legend. Born in Pittsburgh on January 19, 1932, he tackled his way to fame with the Detroit Lions. Schmidt's fierce play earned him spots in both college and pro football Halls of Fame. He dominated as a linebacker, making the Pro Bowl many times and helping the Lions win championships.
activity_question: What team did Joe Schmidt play for?
bonus_fact: After his playing career, Joe Schmidt became the head coach of the Detroit Lions.

title: A Star Is Born in Calcutta
story: Lights, camera, action! In 1935, a future film legend took his first breath in Calcutta. Soumitra Chatterjee entered the world on January 19, destined to become a beloved Indian actor, playwright, and poet. He would go on to shine in Satyajit Ray's famous Apu Trilogy, captivating audiences with his talent.
activity_question: What three roles did Soumitra Chatterjee become famous for?

title: Wrestling Legend Born in Montreal
story: A future wrestling superstar entered the ring of life in Montreal on January 19, 1941. Pat Patterson, who would become a WWE Hall of Famer, was born in Quebec. Patterson's creative mind later dreamed up the exciting Royal Rumble match, thrilling fans worldwide with its unique format.
activity_question: What famous wrestling event did Pat Patterson create?
bonus_fact: The Royal Rumble typically features 30 wrestlers entering the ring at timed intervals.
